narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 2-C (precinct in Medina County) has 893 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
